arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta future: Arsenal sack verdict delivered as Spaniard risks Arsene Wenger-esque "collapse"
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts can understand why the "spotlight is shining" on Mikel Arteta but insists that it is "far too early" to talk about a possible sacking.

arts.ttl: We 'signed' Viktor Gyokeres for Arsenal and the striker added much-needed goals
arts.sum: Another injury in attack could finally tempt Arsenal into signing a new striker, with Sporting Lisbon's Viktor Gyokeres being linked with a move to the Emirates. A striker has been on Arsenal's wishlist for some time now, and with Gabriel Jesus joining the Gunners' injury list in the FA Cup defeat against Manchester United, the Gunners may look to add some depth in attack this January rather than waiting until the summer.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp issues clear Benjamin Sesko verdict as Arsenal striker transfer 'meeting' scheduled
arts.sum: Red Bull chief and former Liverpool boss Jurgen Klopp has delivered a clear verdict on RB Leipzig star Benjamin Sesko amid transfer links to Arsenal. Transfer links between Arsenal and Sesko have somewhat dried up in recent months with the focus instead seemingly on Viktor Gyokeres and Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Dusan Vlahovic to Arsenal transfer hint dropped as Juventus reach January striker 'agreement'
arts.sum: With his current contract expiring in 18 months and Kolo Muani unlikely to be part of PSG's long-term plans it is certainly feasible that Juventus push to bring him in permanently, especially if the deal gets over the line and he performs well, which could in turn see them attempt to receive a significant fee for Vlahovic's departure. As for Vlahovic, it does bring into question his role under Motta with Kolo Muani's preference to play as the striker.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Tottenham postponement latest for North London Derby after Met Office weather warning
arts.sum: Arsenal's clash with Tottenham Hotspur at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night looks set to go ahead despite warnings of mist affecting North London on Wednesday. As for Spurs, they enjoyed a better time in their Carabao Cup semi-final as they beat Liverpool 1-0 before surprisingly being taken to extra time by National League Tamworth.

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka injury: Progress and potential return date
arts.sum: The latest injury news regarding Arsenal star Bukayo Saka.

arts.ttl: How Arsenal will line up with Martin Zubimendi
arts.sum: However, Bukayo Saka, Kai Havertz and Gabriel Martinelli will remain Arteta’s preferred attack if the Gunners aren’t able to add to their forward roster. Arsenal are reportedly close to finalising an agreement to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi this summer.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in ‘advanced talks’ to sign Real Sociedad star
arts.sum: Premier League giants Arsenal are on the verge of closing a deal for a leading member of the midfield ranks at Real Sociedad. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano,…

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou confirms Tottenham attacker could be leaving this January
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are gearing up for an active January transfer window, both in terms of incoming signings and potential loan moves for their young players. They have already secured the signing of 21-year-old goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky from Slavia Prague earlier this month.
